Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Checklist Completed occurs in the entire event log
Percentage of cases where SW-Checklist Completed is immediately followed by SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed appearing before any reviewer assignment activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Checklist Completed as a mandatory step before proceeding to editorial decisions
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Ratio of SW-Checklist Completed occurrences to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed events that occur after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Number of SW-Checklist Completed activities that are preceded by a checklist reminder (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days or SW-Checklist Completion now due)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Checklist Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Checklist Completed leads directly to a rejection outcome (e.g., SW-EIC Reject)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed in comparison to other completion-related activities such as SW-Reviewer Agreed or Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of variants in which SW-Checklist Completed appears exactly once per case
Metric: the average of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed that occur within 24 hours of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Ratio of SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion, indicating completion efficiency
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Checklist Completed is followed by any form of revision request (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision, SW-EIC Minor Revision, or SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Number of SW-Checklist Completed events performed by the SYSTEM performer
